an1.188:1.1: "This is the foremost, *bhikkhus*, among my disciple *bhikkhus* of long standing — namely, Aññāsikoṇḍañña.
an1.189:1.1: … Of those with great discernment [*paññā*] — namely, Sāriputta.
an1.190:1.1: … Of those with psychic powers — namely, Mahāmoggallāna.
an1.191:1.1: … Of those who advocate the austere practices — namely, Mahākassapa.
an1.192:1.1: … Of those with the divine eye — namely, Anuruddha.
an1.193:1.1: … Of those of noble birth — namely, Bhaddiyo, son of Kāḷigodhā.
an1.194:1.1: … Of those with a melodious voice — namely, Lakunḍaka Bhaddiyo.
an1.195:1.1: … Of those who give the lion's roar — namely, Piṇḍolabhāradvāja.
an1.197:1.1: … Of those who analyze in detail the meaning of what was spoken in brief — namely, Mahākaccāna."
